messages.content: 👮🏻 NYPD is actively hiring new cadets and members. Join our server and ask how to apply! All free!
⚠️ Reminder! The grappler is restricted to NYC:RP Staff members only! Unauthorized usage results in server removal!
Remember to use our vehicle liveries! If a car doesn't have one, then please use another one.
Join us in building a wider community by joining our comms! Code "nycrpp". If you have any questions, please do !mod.
🚔 Reminder: Undercover and SWAT/ESU are WHITELISTED. Anything with "WL" written is also WHITELISTED.
